name: Katana - PHIGHTING!
description:
14 days 15 phighters!

Day 9 Katana

ੈ✩‧+ ̊༺sneak peak༻ੈ✩‧+ ̊

Katana has never been one to settle. Always traveling, rather it be out of necessity, or entertainment, he hardly stays stationary. Faces have become a blur, no point in connecting with anyone. All it does is attaches a string of grief he has enough of.

Though he didn’t see himself lasting long here, he really really wanted to. For instance, his neighbor was- gorgeous. You were the perfect neighborly neighbor. Polite, social, and even gave Katana house warning gifts when he first moved in. God you, you were just so perfect. Everything Katana wanted all without even knowing your name. You told him when you first came over but he forgot, his mind was places elsewhere.

. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁
